textbooks: Data Structures using C by Reema Thareja
viva_expert_tips: Always mention Time and Space complexity while explaining algorithms.
Draw pointers clearly while making linked list diagrams.
common_10_mark_questions: Write a C program to implement Stack using Arrays.
Explain In-order, Pre-order and Post-order tree traversals.

viva_expert_tips: Mention the difference between 'Preemptive' and 'Non-preemptive' scheduling clearly.
Explain Context Switching with a process control block (PCB) diagram.
common_10_mark_questions: Explain Bankers Algorithm for deadlock avoidance.
Solve LRU and Optimal page replacement problems.
